# See https://github.com/check-spelling/check-spelling/wiki/Configuration-Examples:-excludes

(?:^|/)(?i)LICEN[CS]E
(?:^|/)(?i)third[-_]?party/
(?:^|/)3rdparty/
(?:^|/)generated/
(?:^|/)go\.sum$
(?:^|/)package(?:-lock|)\.json$
(?:^|/)Pipfile$
(?:^|/)pyproject.toml
(?:^|/)vendor/
(?:^|/|\b)requirements(?:-dev|-doc|-test|)\.txt$

^\.github/actions/spelling/
^\Q.github/workflows/spelling.yml\E$
^extensions/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-7/src/test/resources/mock_es_responses/
^extensions/hadoop/src/test/resources/cp1250\.txt$
^extensions/hadoop/src/test/resources/file-empty\.json$
^extensions/hadoop/src/test/resources/file-empty\.txt$
